calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2019 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment, By Court
Off Calendar Sep-24-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reported by Brenda Crow, CSR#10503 , 415-551-0330, bcrow@sftc.org (514)

Gregory Rougeau, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs Kaizen Holdings, Inc. and Nan Lin.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Roger Lwin and Oodles LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Witness Nan Lin sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $175,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $5265.00
Costs: $1186.33
Total Judgment in the amount of $181,451.33
Judgment signed in open court.

Plaintiffs Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment, By Court
